sprints.strategy: Option B (individual frames, falsprite endpoint not available on fal.ai)
sprints.stem_prompt: uncute angular hand-painted watercolor 2.5D platformer hero, [POSE], Cosmo a small moss-sage green alien boy, two long suction-cup hands and feet, narrow dark eyes with subtle saffron glow catchlight, faded-rose cheek tint very subtle, single small antenna on head, ink-line underdrawing visible through transparent watercolor washes, ink aubergine ragged outline, neutral mushroom-cream paper card background, Studio Ghibli x Moebius Arzach x Tenniel illustration grit, Tenniel woodcut linework, slightly weathered uncute proportions, NOT kawaii NOT chibi NOT blush sparkle NOT airbrush NOT cute mascot, palette mushroom-cream moss-sage sky-wash-blue faded-rose ink-aubergine saffron-glow forest-deep

assets.pose_prompt: side-view facing right mid-stride left foot forward right arm forward left arm back body slight forward lean
assets.notes: blush + grin still present; pose works for walk cycle frame 1

assets.pose_prompt: profile side-view facing right standing upright neutral pose feet together arms hanging down at sides
assets.notes: v1 was blurry + front-view; v2 prefixed with 'crisp sharp focus high detail' fixed both issues

assets.pose_prompt: profile side-view facing right walking mid-stride right leg forward left leg back left arm forward right arm back forward lean
assets.notes: BEST stylistic frame — Tenniel ragged ink line achieved, narrow eye visible, longer limbs

assets.pose_prompt: side-view facing right jump apex pose both arms raised slightly both feet tucked up under body looking forward determined
assets.notes: model rendered as mid-air running pose instead of feet-tucked; works fine for jump apex

assets.pose_prompt: profile side-view facing right falling through air arms outstretched sideways for balance legs angled apart loose body in mid-air descent antenna trailing back
assets.notes: v1 was blurry + dancing pose; v2 with 'crisp sharp focus' + 'antenna trailing back' nailed dynamic falling pose

assets.pose_prompt: front-view facing camera suction-cup hands pressed against invisible wall in front palms forward body pressed flat legs together feet on wall focused expression
assets.notes: sucker-finger-tips visible but standing free i.p.v. pressed against wall — text-only prompt insufficient for this pose; consider image-to-image variant for v2

regeneration_recommendations.reason: pose mismatch (standing free, not pressed against wall)
regeneration_recommendations.approach: use image-to-image with reference of climber pressed against wall, or accept current asset for MVP

sprints.sprint: Sprint 3.1 — Single-biome parallax backgrounds (Slow Bloom L1 + Inkpool Hollow bonus)
sprints.purpose: Replace 3-biome z-stack chaos with 3 depth-layers of one biome per level
sprints.post_processing_attempted: fal-ai/birefnet (remove-bg) — found unsuitable for landscape watercolor, see report

assets.prompt: luminous bright pastel mystical sky background hand-painted watercolor, soft sky-wash blue gradient filling most of frame, NOT dark NOT black NOT night, fluffy mushroom-cream cumulus clouds drifting in upper third, very faint distant moss-sage rolling hill silhouettes barely visible at horizon line bottom edge, gentle saffron-glow warm sun haze backlit from upper-right corner, atmospheric daylight haze, watercolor wet-edge bleeds, paper grain texture, soft Studio Ghibli sky illustration, NOT detailed foreground, soft focus, NO mountains NO ink-aubergine NO dark masses NO characters NO trees NO emoji NO photoreal, palette mushroom-cream sky-wash-blue moss-sage saffron-glow only, predominantly blue and cream values
assets.notes: v1 was pure black image (Flux Pro misread 'ink-aubergine mountains + saffron sun ray' as night scene). v2 fix: 'luminous bright pastel' lead, replaced ink-aubergine mountains with moss-sage hills, added 'NOT dark NOT black NOT night'.

assets.prompt: alien mushroom forest mid-distance silhouettes hand-painted watercolor, translucent moss-sage canopy mushrooms in mid-plane, mushroom-cream tree trunks scattered, faded-rose lichen patches, sky-wash-blue mist drifting between trees, gentle ground line at bottom 1/4 of image, transparent upper half showing sky beyond, paper grain wet-edge bleeds, ink underdrawing, Studio Ghibli x Moebius, NO characters NO foreground close-up flora NO emoji NO photoreal, palette moss-sage mushroom-cream faded-rose sky-wash-blue ink-aubergine
assets.notes: On-style first try. Built-in sky-window in upper portion makes it stack-compatible without true alpha.
BiRefNet stripped trees/ground/lichen/mist; only kept 5-6 largest mushroom caps. Not a useful mid-layer replacement.

assets.prompt: foreground frame elements of mushroom forest hand-painted watercolor, large ink-aubergine drooping vines and mushroom-stalks at the edges of the image (mostly left and right edges and bottom), forest-deep silhouette of large foliage, faded-rose drippy berries hanging in upper corners, ink-aubergine darker edge shadows for depth-framing effect, transparent center showing through to mid/far layers, paper grain heavy outline, Moebius Arzach edge linework, NO characters NO sky NO ground center NO emoji NO photoreal, palette ink-aubergine forest-deep faded-rose mushroom-cream
assets.notes: Excellent depth-frame composition. Engine should apply multiply blend mode (canvas globalCompositeOperation='multiply') so light center disappears against bright far/mid layers.
BiRefNet kept only the largest mushrooms; lost vines, berries, and frame foliage.

inkpool-hollow.description: Cavern interior with crystals, stalactites, and ink pools

assets.prompt: cool palette ONLY, NO warm tones NO orange, distant alien cavern interior background hand-painted watercolor, vast ink-aubergine cave ceiling vault dissolving into deep darkness, faint sky-wash-blue bioluminescent glow seeping from far recesses, forest-deep stalactite silhouettes hanging from upper edge, mushroom-cream phosphorescent specks like distant stars, atmospheric haze, watercolor wet-edge bleeds, paper grain texture, ink-line underdrawing, Studio Ghibli x Moebius x Tenniel illustration, NOT detailed foreground, soft focus, NO characters NO trees NO emoji NO photoreal, palette ink-aubergine forest-deep sky-wash-blue mushroom-cream only
assets.notes: Cool-only enforcement worked — no warm/orange drift.

assets.prompt: cool palette ONLY, NO warm tones NO orange, mid-distance cavern chamber hand-painted watercolor, mid-plane ink-aubergine rock columns and stalagmite silhouettes, sky-wash-blue ink pools reflecting on chamber floor at bottom 1/4, faded-rose crystal clusters glowing softly between columns, forest-deep moss patches on rocks, sky-wash-blue mist drifting through chamber, transparent upper half showing the void beyond, paper grain wet-edge bleeds, ink underdrawing, Studio Ghibli x Moebius, NO characters NO foreground close-up NO emoji NO photoreal, palette ink-aubergine sky-wash-blue faded-rose forest-deep mushroom-cream
assets.notes: Contains 1 small silhouetted figure despite NO characters constraint.

assets.prompt: cool palette ONLY, NO warm tones NO orange, foreground frame elements of cavern hand-painted watercolor, large ink-aubergine jagged stalactites hanging from top edges, forest-deep boulder silhouettes at bottom-left and bottom-right corners, faded-rose dripping crystal tendrils on left and right edges, ink-aubergine darker edge shadows for depth-framing effect, transparent center showing through to mid/far layers, paper grain heavy outline, Moebius Arzach edge linework, NO characters NO sky NO ground center NO emoji NO photoreal, palette ink-aubergine forest-deep faded-rose mushroom-cream
assets.notes: Contains 2 small silhouetted figures despite NO characters constraint.

skipped.reason: BiRefNet wiped image entirely (2.4KB pure white). Cave scenes have no clear foreground subject. File deleted.

engine_recommendations.alternative_for_near: If multiply blend introduces unwanted darkening, run a one-shot Pillow color-key script (PIL.Image: convert near-white pixels to alpha=0) instead of BiRefNet. Cheaper and more controllable for landscape framing layers.

sprints.sprint: Sprint 4.5 Fase B — coherentie-pass (alle in-game assets gere-genereerd)
sprints.purpose: Locked style-stem (v4 hybrid) consistent toepassen op alle in-game assets — Cosmo, enemies, tiles, pickups, backgrounds — voor visuele coherentie met _LOCKED-REFERENCE.png
sprints.stem_canonical: Moebius Arzach woodcut illustration crossed with Tenniel Alice in Wonderland and Hayao Miyazaki, HEAVY INK LINEWORK with visible ink-aubergine underdrawing and ragged outlines, BUT filled with SATURATED LUSH WATERCOLOR — cosmic dreamy luminous palette with glowing magenta-pink fluo-lime electric sky-wash and saffron-glow accents, paper-grain texture, slightly uncanny psychedelic illustration, cosmic-adventure mood, NOT dusk NOT dark NOT moody, full daylight luminous, NOT kawaii NOT chibi NOT pixar NOT cute NOT children-book NOT roblox NOT digital NOT 3D NOT photoreal, INK LINEWORK COMPULSORY

sprite_cosmo.caveat: body-form drift (sucker-hands → claw-fingers, antenna → spikes/quills); style-coherentie 5/5 met reference, body-form lower priority polish

sprite_enemy.note: alle 3 enemies SHIP-quality met perfecte Tenniel-Moebius-Miyazaki coherentie

files.note: v2 retry 1024x512 succeeded; BiRefNet overstrips landscape-strips, gebruik raw met multiply-blend
v1 = full landscape; cleaned = vertical stone column herbruikbaar als wall pillar
BiRefNet kept whole landscape, niet bruikbaar

tile.lesson: STEM-keywords 'psychedelic illustration' + 'cosmic-adventure mood' biased Flux Dev naar landscapes voor 4/5 tiles. Werkende fix = aspect 2:1 + texture-strip-rider FRONT + STEM-keywords gestripped voor tiles

pickup.note: rider-FRONT pattern werkt voor pickups omdat object dominant is en BiRefNet betrouwbaar extract

background_parallax.caveat: 3 van 4 BG's hebben tiny human-figures ondanks NO characters. Voor v0.5.0 polish: 6-fold negatives stack

sprints.strategy: Flux Fill (fal-ai/flux-lora-fill) inpainting + BiRefNet + PIL alpha-erase

sprints.production_prompt: small green pear-shaped alien creature with two long thin arms extending outward sideways from the torso, each arm ending in a LARGE FLAT ROUND BLACK DISC suction-cup pad like a glossy black rubber toilet plunger head, the suction-cup pads are pure obsidian-black smooth circles bigger than the head of a thumb, soft Studio Ghibli watercolor with ink-aubergine outline and paper-grain texture, faded-rose freckle spots on green skin, off-white painterly paper background, NOT fingers NOT human-hand NOT lizard-claw NOT pointed-claw NOT mitten NOT ear NOT cheek NOT face NOT headphones NOT folded-arms NOT tucked-arms
sprints.wiring_change: src/phaser/scenes/L1Scene.ts:86 — canonical const updated from cosmo-canonical-cleaned.png to cosmo-canonical-v2-cleaned.png
key_learnings: Flux Fill ADDS-geometry-in-bg-space well, FAILS to override anatomy-bias inside body silhouette
Tail-removal: SKIP inpaint, use deterministic PIL alpha-erase post-BiRefNet (zero cost, 100% reliable)
Disc-fuse refinement passes risk regression (Flux interprets small masked area as separate creature)
Multi-frame anim still NOT solved — needs ControlNet or sketch-to-img (per Sprint 5B learnings)
open_issues: Disc not fully fused to wrist — claw-fingers visible around black ball. Acceptable as suction-cup hint.
Tiny tail-stub remnant under feet (cosmetic only at 120px in-game display)
